response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: There was no reference vocal music, only conversational dialogue, which matched perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully manual transcription of the dialogue was completed for all characters. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all subtitles tightly around character vocalizations and included the on-screen summary text card during the quiet transition in Scene 3 to ensure full story context. No CC tags or non-speech elements were included. Fixed a timestamp issue in Scene 3 where a subtitle had identical start and end times.

subtitles.original: It was really delicious. We're so proud of it!
subtitles.english: It was really delicious. We're so proud of it!

subtitles.original: Five stars! You ruined Thanksgiving.
subtitles.english: Five stars! You ruined Thanksgiving.

subtitles.original: Bijou can do whatever she wants, and you are no one to tell her what to do.
subtitles.english: Bijou can do whatever she wants, and you are no one to tell her what to do.

subtitles.original: Well, I can say whatever I want to!
subtitles.english: Well, I can say whatever I want to!

subtitles.original: She's my client!
subtitles.english: She's my client!

subtitles.original: Leave her alone, Gigi. Leave Bijou alone.
subtitles.english: Leave her alone, Gigi. Leave Bijou alone.

subtitles.original: So, what are we here for anyways?
subtitles.english: So, what are we here for anyways?

subtitles.original: Dinner! Dinner! Dinner!
subtitles.english: Dinner! Dinner! Dinner!

subtitles.original: Do we get to actually eat?
subtitles.english: Do we get to actually eat?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Are we gonna eat? That's right!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Are we gonna eat? That's right!

subtitles.original: Are we gonna eat? Oh my god! We're gonna eat!
subtitles.english: Are we gonna eat? Oh my god! We're gonna eat!

subtitles.original: Anyways, I want to go back to the kitchen and finish cooking.
subtitles.english: Anyways, I want to go back to the kitchen and finish cooking.

subtitles.original: Yeah, where you belong.
subtitles.english: Yeah, where you belong.

subtitles.original: You b**ch! Whoa! Oh!
subtitles.english: You b**ch! Whoa! Oh!

subtitles.original: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!

subtitles.original: Hold her back! Hold her back off of her! Oh, you b**ch!
subtitles.english: Hold her back! Hold her back off of her! Oh, you b**ch!

subtitles.original: Help! Hold her back! Abuse! Animal abuse!
subtitles.english: Help! Hold her back! Abuse! Animal abuse!

subtitles.original: Are you okay, girl? Girl, are you okay?
subtitles.english: Are you okay, girl? Girl, are you okay?

subtitles.original: Animal abuse? Animal abuse? Where?
subtitles.english: Animal abuse? Animal abuse? Where?

subtitles.original: Just because your dad is a lawyer doesn't mean you can do whatever you want!
subtitles.english: Just because your dad is a lawyer doesn't mean you can do whatever you want!

subtitles.original: That spork does not suit you.
subtitles.english: That spork does not suit you.

subtitles.original: Make me look good in the edit, okay? Check out my profile.
subtitles.english: Make me look good in the edit, okay? Check out my profile.

subtitles.original: Mmm... I feel like that was too many swear words.
subtitles.english: Mmm... I feel like that was too many swear words.

subtitles.original: I think they said too... there's too many bleepings in there.
subtitles.english: I think they said too... there's too many bleepings in there.

subtitles.original: Yeah, it was almost like a Morse code.
subtitles.english: Yeah, it was almost like a Morse code.

subtitles.original: Did they even censor "f**k"? Or "sh*t"?
subtitles.english: Did they even censor "f**k"? Or "sh*t"?

subtitles.original: Ah! I just... I don't know...
subtitles.english: Ah! I just... I don't know...

subtitles.original: We must stop. I would never swear on your channel, by the way.
subtitles.english: We must stop. I would never swear on your channel, by the way.

subtitles.original: Yeah, you're so sweet. That's really nice of you.
subtitles.english: Yeah, you're so sweet. That's really nice of you.

subtitles.original: I would never f**king do that. That's so messed up of someone to do.
subtitles.english: I would never f**king do that. That's so messed up of someone to do.

subtitles.original: Yeah, really f**ked up. I just wish they would have edited that out, you know?
subtitles.english: Yeah, really f**ked up. I just wish they would have edited that out, you know?

subtitles.original: Yeah, I... I just... I'm really uncomfortable right now.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I... I just... I'm really uncomfortable right now.

subtitles.original: I'm only five minutes old. I'm not allowed to hear those words.
subtitles.english: I'm only five minutes old. I'm not allowed to hear those words.

subtitles.original: I'm just really scared. It's also just... I don't think we're gonna make any money out of that because it's not going to be allowed to be aired.
subtitles.english: I'm just really scared. It's also just... I don't think we're gonna make any money out of that because it's not going to be allowed to be aired.

subtitles.original: They'll demonetize our channel! Nooo!
subtitles.english: They'll demonetize our channel! Nooo!

subtitles.original: What if... what if we have a show, but instead of like... real people, it's scripted?
subtitles.english: What if... what if we have a show, but instead of like... real people, it's scripted?

subtitles.original: Oh! Yeah! And then we can make sure that there's no curse words in it, we'll take them all out.
subtitles.english: Oh! Yeah! And then we can make sure that there's no curse words in it, we'll take them all out.

subtitles.original: Yeah, yeah! It can still be drama, right?
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah! It can still be drama, right?

subtitles.original: Mm, but just... just no curse words. No cursing, please! Please, no cursing on our channel.
subtitles.english: Mm, but just... just no curse words. No cursing, please! Please, no cursing on our channel.

subtitles.original: Previously on Half a Fortnite Away from Death - The Tale of Beaver and Thinker:
subtitles.english: Previously on Half a Fortnite Away from Death - The Tale of Beaver and Thinker:

subtitles.original: Two unlikely survivors find each other in the middle of the apocalypse...
subtitles.english: Two unlikely survivors find each other in the middle of the apocalypse...

subtitles.original: ...and although wary, they've come to find comfort in each other's presence.
subtitles.english: ...and although wary, they've come to find comfort in each other's presence.

subtitles.original: Haunted by their past, afraid of a future that may never come...
subtitles.english: Haunted by their past, afraid of a future that may never come...

subtitles.original: ...will they ever be able to overcome their struggles in a dying world?
subtitles.english: ...will they ever be able to overcome their struggles in a dying world?

subtitles.original: So, have you thought about it?
subtitles.english: So, have you thought about it?

subtitles.original: You just... you just always say things, but in reality...
subtitles.english: You just... you just always say things, but in reality...

subtitles.original: I love you. No, you love your wife!
subtitles.english: I love you. No, you love your wife!

subtitles.original: She's dead now. You don't even remember...
subtitles.english: She's dead now. You don't even remember...

subtitles.original: Even if she's dead, that doesn't mean she's not there anymore.
subtitles.english: Even if she's dead, that doesn't mean she's not there anymore.

subtitles.original: And I've been thinking about it, because I'm the Thinker.
subtitles.english: And I've been thinking about it, because I'm the Thinker.

subtitles.original: What are you even? I'm the Beaver.
subtitles.english: What are you even? I'm the Beaver.

subtitles.original: Oh man, if I was a beaver, I'd be eating so good right now.
subtitles.english: Oh man, if I was a beaver, I'd be eating so good right now.

subtitles.original: Is that wood? Cause I have wood. Look at my wood, check it out.
subtitles.english: Is that wood? Cause I have wood. Look at my wood, check it out.

subtitles.original: Pretty impressive wood. So you would want for nothing. I can provide for you.
subtitles.english: Pretty impressive wood. So you would want for nothing. I can provide for you.

subtitles.original: But you... you love your wife! You don't understand! But still, she's... she's your wife!
subtitles.english: But you... you love your wife! You don't understand! But still, she's... she's your wife!

subtitles.original: The past seven days... that we've learned to survive.
subtitles.english: The past seven days... that we've learned to survive.

subtitles.original: You just want me for my body. You're not interested in my mind.
subtitles.english: You just want me for my body. You're not interested in my mind.

subtitles.original: I want you for your mind! I'm the Thinker! I want you! No, no.
subtitles.english: I want you for your mind! I'm the Thinker! I want you! No, no.

subtitles.original: No, you have to understand! You're wrong! No! No, please! Please!
subtitles.english: No, you have to understand! You're wrong! No! No, please! Please!

subtitles.original: It doesn't have to be like this! Look at my wood!
subtitles.english: It doesn't have to be like this! Look at my wood!

subtitles.original: No, I don't want to look at your wood! Ah! Look at my wood! Oh, please!
subtitles.english: No, I don't want to look at your wood! Ah! Look at my wood! Oh, please!

subtitles.original: I don't want your wood! I don't... But you'll be so full!
subtitles.english: I don't want your wood! I don't... But you'll be so full!

subtitles.original: No, ew, ew, put that away, ew! Look at my wood!
subtitles.english: No, ew, ew, put that away, ew! Look at my wood!

subtitles.original: You don't even want me for my mind, you want me...
subtitles.english: You don't even want me for my mind, you want me...

subtitles.original: Ah! Skeleton! A skeleton!
subtitles.english: Ah! Skeleton! A skeleton!

subtitles.original: Run away, run away! I'll protect us!
subtitles.english: Run away, run away! I'll protect us!

subtitles.original: I mean... I mean, Beaver! I'm the Beaver! I'm not Gigi, I'm Beaver! I'm the Beaver!
subtitles.english: I mean... I mean, Beaver! I'm the Beaver! I'm not Gigi, I'm Beaver! I'm the Beaver!

subtitles.original: Beaver, be careful!
subtitles.english: Beaver, be careful!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, where did you get that weapon? I've never seen you use that before.
subtitles.english: Oh my god, where did you get that weapon? I've never seen you use that before.

subtitles.original: Yeah, I've used... I... I bought it from that one pawn shop owner, remember?
subtitles.english: Yeah, I've used... I... I bought it from that one pawn shop owner, remember?

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, that guy! That was a good thing. Was it So-Wamy?
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, that guy! That was a good thing. Was it So-Wamy?

subtitles.original: No.
subtitles.english: No.

subtitles.original: Watch out, Beaver, watch out! Watch out! Watch out!
subtitles.english: Watch out, Beaver, watch out! Watch out! Watch out!

subtitles.original: Oh, that was so cool!
subtitles.english: Oh, that was so cool!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, the skeleton! She's so cool! Whoa! Whoa! Whoa! What's that? Best skeleton is going down!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, the skeleton! She's so cool! Whoa! Whoa! Whoa! What's that? Best skeleton is going down!
